textByHash.9eefc1ab8a8d85d8a221e81ecd3fdc8546b00c9a: Who are you? Why are you in my home?
textByHash.c05310dd24c65bb4ecb02402f78d83b432303c69: You half-breeds are becoming too arrogant for your own good. If you're not careful, someone might call for a good culling. Now get out of my house!
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
